parents.subject: LU-18162 osc: convert Object Storage Client to LU device

commit.subject: LU-18162 llite: consolidate cl_stack_fini()/lu_stack_fini()
commit.message:
LU-18162 llite: consolidate cl_stack_fini()/lu_stack_fini()

lu_stack_fini() is only called by cl_stack_fini(), which is
simply a thin wrapper around the former. Consolidate these
two functions by deleting cl_stack_fini().

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I88a863426ada279b0c6948f1bb259fcc8c51b0f6
